name: ExtensionValueSet_Expansion_Property
title: R5: Additional information supplied about each concept (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ValueSet.expansion.property` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ValueSet.expansion.property` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ValueSet.expansion.property` 0..* `BackboneElement`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ValueSet.expansion.property` has a context of ValueSet.expansion based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `ValueSet`.
Element `ValueSet.expansion.property` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
